'''''Ayenzii''''' was [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] used by [[Rneekii]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]. The strike cruiser attempted to negotiate a deal into selling a kidnapped [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as they were the highest bidder. But they underestimated the Empire. They sent [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] as a pilot escort for the ransom, and as soon as the transfer was complete he attacked their transport and disabled it. Then the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] ''[[Red Claw]]'' then arrived and trapped the pirates, and the ''Ayenzii'' and the [[R-41 Starchaser]]s were all destroyed, despite interference from the [[Nami]] who attempted to capture the scientist and destroy the Red Claw. As for the transport carrying the ransom it was captured.
